footer.credit: Made for the Openwave 2026 hackathon — İRİA × Nərimanov RİH × Tedspace.

home.heroSub: Outages, queues, and unsafe spots — in one place, in real time.
home.feature1Desc: Water, electricity, and gas outages — local, accurate, live.
home.feature2Desc: Queue times at ASAN, polyclinics, and post offices — reported by residents.
home.feature3Desc: Poor lighting, broken crossings — one tap to flag, the district can answer.
home.openDataBody: NarPulse combines official sources, public notices, and resident reports in one place. Everything is open — use it, share it, build on it.

about.title: About
about.lead: NarPulse brings the pulse of Nərimanov together in one place.
about.p1: Built during the Openwave 48-hour hackathon — partnered with İRİA, Nərimanov District Executive Authority, and Tedspace.
about.p2: The idea is simple: residents open their phone and see what's happening; the district team opens a dashboard and sees where help is needed.
about.p3: Everything is open data. The project is open source.
